content:
The Unexpected AI Stack That Helped Me Turn Repetitive Business Tasks Into a Product Clients Actually Paid For

5 min read
Just now

--

Press enter or click to view image in full size

Photo by Immo Wegmann on UnsplashA year ago, I had a bad habit.
Whenever I discovered a new AI library, I immediately wanted to use it.
The result?
A folder filled with unfinished projects.
Half-built chatbots.
Abandoned AI assistants.
Random experiments that never generated a single dollar.
Then one weekend, I challenged myself to do something different.
Instead of testing libraries individually, I tried combining the best AI tools into a single workflow designed to solve a real business problem.
The goal was simple:
Take incoming leads, research prospects, generate personalized outreach, create reports, and deliver everything automatically.
What started as a weekend experiment eventually became one of the most requested automation services I offered.
